titleStmt.title: SII 40.276: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 276. (A.R. No. B. 321 of 1933.) Nemalipuri, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone set up opposite to the temple of Vēṇugōpālasvāmi.
This is dated Śaka 1 • • ., Nala, Vaiśākha, śu. [15], Friday.

Records the construction of a temple for Gōpīnātha and consecration of the god and grant of lands for providing offerings at Nemalipuri in Bellaṁkoṇḍa-sīma by Śākhamūri Nāgayyaṅgāru, for the merit of his great grandfather, grandfather and parents Anantanēni and Akkalamma. Namalipuri and its attached villages are stated to have been given as nāyaṅkara to Mēdarameṭla Siṅgama-Nāyaniṅgāru by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jillēḷḷa Raṅgapatirājayyadēva-Mahārāja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1
Agunēṁṭi nala saṁvatsara vaiśākha śuddha 15 śu śrī
rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī
sadāsivadēva mahārāyalu pṛthivī sāmrā
jyamu sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śrīmanmahā
maṁḍḍalēśvara jillēḷla raṁggapati rājayyadēva ma
hārājuluṁgāru mēdarameṭṭa śiṁgga mahā
rāyaniṁgāri nāyaṁkarānaku belleṁkoṁḍa
sīmalōnu pāliṁcci yiccina nemalipuri grāmālalō
nu namalipuri paṭnanu [A]nteṁbaragaḍḍanāḷavaṁ
bbaragaṁḍḍa paragaṁḍḍa bhairavapaṁnni mārkkōluga
ṁḍḍa yēlēḍugāṁḍla dīkṣādiguruva viluvidya
paraśarāmadilēśalāḍarāya rāhuttavēśyā
bhujaṁgga janakula cakravartti veṭlalacēṭi gōtra
pavitṛlaina śākhamūri nāgayyaṁgāru tama
tāta sūrapanēnikinni tamamuttāta pāpanā
naṁmmaṁgārikinni tama taṁḍri Anaṁttanēnikinni ta
ma talli Akkalammaṁgārikinni puṇyaṁgānu namalipu
ri gōpināthani dēvuḷaṁ gaṭṭiṁcci gōpināthunni pra
tiṣṭa sēyiṁcciri yī gōpināthaniki Amṛtapaḷlaku na
girakaṁḍirēvu tūrppunaku cellenakunuguṁḍi nama
ccelānu ciṁdeḷla polāna kaṁccelānu mestimi yī dēvuḷaṁ ga
ṭṭina bellaṁ koṁḍa kadaranirvābattuniki koṁḍapalli pōlāna na
malipuri ceruvu paḍamaṭanu kuccelānu doṁtaṁguṁḍi
ḍanakuccelānu yī reṁḍu kucceḷlakṣētraṁ dhārāpūrvakaṁ
gānu yistimigāna mī putrapautrapāraṁparyaṁgānu Ā
caṁdrārkkasthāyigānu Anubhaviṁci bratikēdi yī kṣē
trālaku yevaru dappinānu gaṁggakarttagōvu brahmani
vadhiṁccina pāpāna pōvuvāru tamatallidaṁḍrādulanu
vāraṇāśilō vadhiṁccina pāpānabōvuvāru . svadattaṁ
dvāyō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahasrā
Digital edition of SII 40.276 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
